headline: Will Equinix’s New CFO Shift the AI Data Center Strategy at EQIX?
summary: Equinix recently appointed Olivier Leonetti as chief financial officer, effective March 16, replacing longtime finance chief Keith Taylor after his 27-year tenure with the company. This leadership transition comes as Equinix is framed alongside mining operators pivoting into AI and high‑performance computing infrastructure, underscoring its role at the center of accelerating AI data‑center demand. Next, we’ll examine how Leonetti’s arrival as CFO could influence Equinix’s existing investment...

headline: This One ETF Gives Retirees Quiet Exposure to AI Infrastructure REITs
summary: Income investors hunting for AI infrastructure exposure often land on Pacer Data & Infrastructure Real Estate ETF (NYSEARCA:SRVR). The fund packages data centers, cell towers, and related digital infrastructure REITs into a single, low-cost wrapper. The dividend safety question is more nuanced than the appeal. How SRVR Generates Its Income SRVR’s yield comes entirely from ... This One ETF Gives Retirees Quiet Exposure to AI Infrastructure REITs
